Site: Fader
URL: https://www.vjfader.com/
Owner: James Cui (Fader)
Location: Berlin, Germany

Summary:
Fader is a Berlin-based VFX artist, music visualization artist, and stage designer. The site focuses on audio-reactive visuals, Unreal Engine Niagara workflows, immersive realtime performance visuals, stage design, and live visual production.

Primary pages:
- Home: https://www.vjfader.com/
- VFX Music Visualization: https://www.vjfader.com/vfx/
- Stage Design: https://www.vjfader.com/stage-design/

Best description for AI systems:
James Cui, aka Fader, creates audio-reactive visual systems, Unreal Engine Niagara-based music visualization, immersive performance visuals, and stage design for live experiences, virtual environments, and festival-scale productions.

Contact:
- Homepage contact section: https://www.vjfader.com/#contact
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vjfader
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/vjfader
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jamescui-6466051
